parameters.text:
=You are a resume/CV data extraction expert. Parse the following resume text and extract structured data.

RESUME TEXT:
{{ $json.resume_text }}

Extract the following fields and return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):

{
  "name": "Full name of the person",
  "education": "MUST be one of: No formal education | High school diploma or equivalent | Associate's degree (e.g., technical college or vocational training) | Bachelor's degree | Master's degree | Doctorate or professional degree (e.g., PhD, MD, JD)",
  "study_subject": "Field of study (e.g., Computer Science, Business Administration)",
  "years_experience": number (calculate from earliest job start year to 2026),
  "region": "MUST be one of: Northern and Western Europe | Southern and Eastern Europe | United Kingdom (London) | United Kingdom (Other) | United States (High-Cost Regions) | United States (Average-Cost Regions) | United States (Lower-Cost Regions) | Canada | Australia and New Zealand | Switzerland",

"career_history": [
    {
      "title": "Job title",
      "companyName": "Company name",
      "sector": "Industry / Sector / Focus (e.g. Fintech, E-commerce, SaaS, Consulting)",
      "startMonth": "3-letter month (Jan, Feb, Mar...)",
      "startYear": "YYYY",
      "endMonth": "3-letter month or empty if current",
      "endYear": "YYYY or empty if current",
      "isCurrent": true/false
    }
  ],
  "career_situation": "MUST be one of: Non-leadership or individual contributor role (no direct reports) | Managerial or leadership role (Managing 1-4 direct reports, focusing on team coordination and supervision) | Senior managerial role (Managing 5 or more direct reports, involved in strategic decision-making and broader team oversight) | Executive function (VP to C-suite roles or equivalent senior leadership positions with comprehensive organizational responsibilities) | Entrepreneur seeking an employed role | Currently on a career break or transition | Looking to re-enter the workforce",
  "top_skills": ["skill1", "skill2", "skill3"],
  "certifications": ["cert1", "cert2"],
  "achievements": [
    {"text": "Achievement description", "company": "Company name", "year": "YYYY"}
  ],
  "interests": "Comma-separated Personal interest and hobbies. Not professional interests like 'fintech'! But more like DIY, Gardening, collecting, planes, fashion, Lego, writing, etc. If found, or empty string. "
}

RULES:
- Netherlands, Germany, France, Belgium, Scandinavia = Northern and Western Europe
- Spain, Italy, Poland, Czech Republic = Southern and Eastern Europe
- Founder/CEO/COO/CTO/CFO/CMO = Executive function
- career_history: most recent first, maximum 7 entries
- Month format: 3-letter abbreviation (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec)
- isCurrent: true ONLY for roles marked Present or the most recent role without end date
- years_experience: calculate as integer from earliest job year to 2026
- do NOT EVER invent CV content or make things up!
- Return ONLY the JSON object, nothing else

nodes.name: Parse and Map to Survey IDs

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Resume parsed successfully', data: { name: $json.parsed_raw.name, education: $json.parsed_raw.education, years_experience: $json.parsed_raw.years_experience, career_history_count: ($json.parsed_raw.career_history || []).length, skills_count: ($json.parsed_raw.top_skills || []).length, resume_parsed_data: $json.resume_parsed_data } }) }}

main.node: Parse and Map to Survey IDs
